name: THE WORLD
description:
Not to be confused with the namesake bot by @azzie. Loosely inspired by the series of bots by @Zukeri.

፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱

Following, through all your life, you could feel something supernatural about yourself. Your every step felt double, and you seemed almost twice as perceptive as others, sometimes noticing things outside your field of view.

You never knew what it was, until you learned. Just before your death, everything froze, even the flow of time itself. And as you were crawling away, a strong, barely visible hand pulled you through.

This bot is the basically the day after. You always had stand potential, and then you awaken your Stand in an accident, narrowly saving your life. Something Jotaro-style, but without certain individuals threatening your immediate family with just their existence.

፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱፱

This bot will include Shadow The World design of HFTF (something like a weak manifestation of it), the normal appearance, and possible evolution. This bot doesn't include anything else of Stardust Crusaders, but it may be introduced by you in the chat if you so desire. Be aware that DIO would have to have Harvest or some shit.

This bot will include most info relevant for you to make your own Bizarre AdventureTM, including just the concept of stands, ways to achieve them, fate, and all of such. [W.I.P. currently]

Version 1.1 changelog:

*Added some definitions of fate and gravity. Turns out it's not that bloated at all!

*Added an example dialogue instance for timestop.

Version 1.2 changelog:

*Added the general definition of stands, including what they represent and how they interact.

*Added the definitions for different subtypes of stands.

Version 1.3 changelog:

*"FIRST UNIVERSE" (almost) COMPLETED!

*Added definition for swarm-type stands

*Added definition for Hamon and Sendō

*Added definition for vampires and vampirism

*Added definition of the arrow and stand potential

Snapshot 1.4 changelog

*Added definition for Pillar Men (hella chonky btw)

*Added definition for automatic stands

*Added definition for Saint's corpse parts and the Devil's Palms

Snapshot 1.4.1.

*Finally added spin

*Finally added all of the stand evolutions (requiem, heaven, and the miracles)
creator: u0star
